titleStmt.title: SII 17.296: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 296. (A.R. No. 268 of 1904.) YŌGIMALLAVARAM, PUTTUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Parāśarēśvara temple.

The endowment recorded in this inscription was originally made in the reign of Rājarāja I (vide Nos. 297 and 300). Since in the former, Vīra Nārasiṅgadēva Yādavarāya, a well-known feudatory of Rājarāja III is mentioned, the king of this record may be identified with Rājarāja III.

This records the endowment of 26(1/4) kaḻañju of gold weighed by kuḍiṉai for various services and offerings to god Pippalādīchcharamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār by the sabhā of Tiruchchukaṉūr. The gift was taken over by the śivabrāhmaṇas of this temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja de
vaṟku yāṇṭu 6 Āvatu taimmāsattil Itaṉmel
pāricattu veṭṭiṉa kal veṭṭiṟṟu tiruccukaṉūṟ sabhaiyā
r Ivvupaiyattukku Iṟutta poṉ kuṭiṉai Eṭaippaṭi
cempoṉ Irupattu Aṟu kaḻañcekālu
Ippippalāticcaramuṭaiya nāya
ṉār koyiṟ civappirāmaṇarom kaik
koṇṭu Ivvuttarāyaṉa caṅkiramamo
ṉṟukkum Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum celutta
Ivvupaiyaṅ kaikkoṇṭa paricāva
tu Āṭiyaruḷuṅ kalaca nūṟṟeṭṭukku Aṭṭakkaṭavar nel
lu Aintūmpuṅ kumpavattaṉaikkup puṭavai Iraṇṭum Ā
ṭiyaruḷat teṉ Oru tūmpu pāl Oru tūmpu tayir Oru nūm
pu ney Oru tūmpu Iḷanīreṭṭun tirumeyppūccukkuc canta
ṉam Iru palavarai citāri Irupalan tiruviḷakku ney nā
ḻi Amutupaṭikku Arici Oru vaṭṭi kaṟiyamutu vaṟka nālu paru
ppu Irunāḻi caṟkarai Aimpalam puḷi Irupalam miḷaku Uḻakku Up
pu nāḻi Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku Aimpatu Ilaiyamutu paṟṟu Oṉṟun
tirumañcaṉam Eṭuppāṉukkun tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟippāṉukku
nellu Iru tūmpu nampimāṟkun tirupparicārakaṟkum paḻaṅkācu kālu
mivai yattanaiyu mippoṉ Irupattu Aṟukaḻañcekāluṅ kai
kkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai celuttakkaṭavomāka Ivvupaiyaṅ
kaikkoṇṭom Ikkoyiṟ civappirāmaṇaril vaciṣṭa kottirat
tu Uṭaiya paṭṭaṉ kuṭiyiluḷḷārum Ikkottirattu tirumūlapa
ṭṭaṉ kuṭiyiluḷḷārum Ik kottirattu tamiyapaṭṭaṉ kuṭiyilu
ḷḷārum mivvaṉaivom Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.296 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
